Parties: Quarrystone Robotics Ltd (ACN 612 345 987), an ASX-listed issuer, and Denali Bay Capital Pty Ltd (ACN 835 222 119) (Investor); primary contact: Ms. Eliza Ward, Company Secretary, eliza.ward@quarrystone.com.au, +61 2 5550 0199; Investor contact: Mr. Jonah Pike, Director, invest@denalibay.com.au.
Instrument and size: A$12,000,000 senior unsecured convertible notes with 1-for-2 attaching unlisted options; notes to convert into fully paid ordinary shares in Quarrystone.
Key terms: 6.75% p.a. cash coupon, 36‑month maturity, conversion price A$0.58 (20% premium to 10‑day VWAP prior to announcement), option exercise price A$0.70, anti‑dilution customary for pro‑rata issues.
Use of proceeds: Scale-up of the Marrinup assembly line and working capital; no funds applied to related‑party payments.
Conditions precedent: (a) shareholder approval under ASX Listing Rules 7.1 and, if required due to scale, 11.1.2; (b) ASX in‑principle advice on Listing Rule 11 (significant change) if triggered; (c) sophisticated investor status for Investor under s708(8) Corporations Act; (d) execution of securityholder commitment letters (non‑binding).
Disclosure and timing: Announcement to ASX Platform under Listing Rule 3.1 immediately after execution; if leak risk arises, the Company will request a trading halt; Appendix 3B to be lodged prior to any issue; cleansing notice under s708A(5)(e) to be lodged on first conversion.
Blackout windows and trading: The Company and Investor acknowledge closed periods under the Company’s Securities Trading Policy; no dealing by directors, employees, or Investor while in possession of information not generally available (MNPI) as defined in s1042A; blackout applies from quarter end until release of Appendix 4C and from 1 July until FY results.
MNPI and selective disclosure: This term sheet and accompanying revenue pipeline schedules contain non‑public, issuer‑material information reasonably expected to affect Quarrystone’s securities; no selective briefings—any deck for Investor meetings must first be released on the ASX Platform; wall‑crossing consents required for any additional potential investors.
Issuer‑relative materiality: Covenants and forecast thresholds are assessed against Quarrystone’s current market capitalisation and liquidity profile; breach of minimum cash covenant (A$4.0m) is considered material for Listing Rule 3.1 purposes.
Public information reference (non‑MNPI): The ASX announcement titled “Q3 Activities Report and Appendix 4C” dated 15 April 2025 is already generally available and is included only as background; reliance on that release does not create MNPI.
Benign/non‑issuer update: The state industry council’s generic media release on robotics tax incentives last month is not specific to the Company and is not considered price‑sensitive for Quarrystone.
Operational note (non‑material): A scheduled upgrade by an external logistics provider, Wattle Freight Co., may extend delivery lead times by two days in July; based on current volumes this is not expected to be material to the issuer.
Covenants: Minimum cash A$4.0m; quarterly information undertakings (unaudited management accounts shared under NDA); negative pledge on new debt save for ordinary‑course equipment leases up to A$500k aggregate.
Events of default and remedies: Non‑payment (10 business day cure), insolvency, continuous disclosure breach not rectified within 5 business days, or delisting; upon EoD, Investor may require immediate redemption at 105% of outstanding principal plus accrued interest.
Shareholder approvals and timetable: EGM targeted within 6 weeks of signing; notice of meeting and explanatory memorandum to be lodged with ASX prior to dispatch; if shareholder approval is not obtained, parties will confer on revised terms or termination without break fee.
Privacy and data handling: Personal information exchanged (e.g., names, roles, contact details of noteholders and employees) will be handled in accordance with the Privacy Act 1988 (Cth); no health information is sought or required under this term sheet.
Confidentiality: Except for required ASX disclosures, this document is confidential and may be shared only with professional advisers bound by confidentiality obligations; if the transaction does not proceed within 60 days, materials in the data room must be returned or destroyed upon request via dataroom@quarrystone.com.au.
